description_long: This is an ornate, high-backed armchair with a luxurious, deep red upholstery and elaborate gold accents. The backrest is tall and features a tufted diamond pattern with buttons, framed by a dark wooden border and crowned with a decorative gold crest. The armrests are thick, rolled, and padded, with matching red upholstery and gold trim, providing a regal and comfortable appearance. The seat is wide and plush, designed for comfort, and the front apron is adorned with an additional gold ornamental detail. The legs are elegantly curved in a cabriole style, made of dark wood, adding to the chair's classic and sophisticated look. The rear of the chair is fully upholstered in red, with a smooth finish and subtle decorative elements on the sides.
description: A luxurious, high-backed armchair with deep red tufted upholstery, ornate gold accents, and elegantly curved wooden legs. The chair exudes a regal, classic style with plush, rolled armrests and a decorative crest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted diamond-patterned backrest, plush seat, rolled armrests, and ornate gold details.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, padded armrest, the depth of the seat, and the elegant curve of the wooden leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, fully upholstered back with subtle side decorations and the cabriole legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest profile and the chair's overall depth.
attribute_armrest_design: thick, rolled, padded and upholstered in red leather with gold trim
attribute_backrest_style: high, tufted, diamond-patterned with a decorative gold crest and dark wood frame
attribute_leg_type: curved cabriole legs made of dark wood
